calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Off Calendar

Petition For Termination Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Aug-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martha Daetwyler for Arnold Meltsner.

The Court stated that re-notice of the second amendment was needed, that there were changes in the relief sought, spoke of the terms of the Trust and asked Counsel if she would consider withdrawing the second amendment. Ms. Daetwyler stated that she would rather continue today's petition, re-notice the petition and go forward with the amendment and the second amendment that was presented to the Court. In addition, Ms. Daetwyler stated that she was confident that Wells Fargo will not consent to the petition if they take out the language that is required by Wells Fargo. The other option is that this matter be taken off calendar and Wells Fargo can file a petition to terminate the Trust. The matter was continued to August 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Termination Of Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Jun-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
